match.userMessage:
Slow handheld push-in drifts toward the marble vanity. Scarlett's sun-kissed hand reaches forward, grasps the coral box, lifts it smoothly off the surface, and flips the lid open with a soft snap.

Her torso stays leaned in, maintaining a gentle smile while the arm completes the natural lifting motion. Subtle sunlight glints shift across the box edges as it opens.

soft ocean waves and light breeze through open window. light hand contact on marble, soft snap of coral box lid opening.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
